entries.name: delegations-activate-pending
entries.purpose: Hourly. Dispatches ActivateDelegationsJob to transition pending delegations to active on starts_at. The delegation lifecycle depends on this — a delegate cannot exercise a pending delegation, and consumer resolvers (RBAC + workflow/approvals) check state=active before honouring the delegation.

entries.name: delegations-expire-past-ends
entries.purpose: Hourly. Dispatches ExpireDelegationsJob to transition active delegations to expired on ends_at. Delegator gets NotifyDelegatorOfExpirationJob via the event chain.

entries.name: impersonation-end-past-ttl
entries.purpose: Every 5 minutes — critical cadence. Dispatches EndImpersonationSessionsJob to terminate sessions past ends_at. The impersonation.enforce_active_session middleware ALSO refuses expired-but-not-yet-transitioned PATs within the request cycle so the 5-minute lag never permits an active-past-expiry window.

entries.name: delegations-purge-retention-window
entries.purpose: Daily 03:15 UTC. Dispatches PurgeRevokedDelegationsJob to hard-delete soft-deleted role_delegations rows past the 730-day retention window. Coordinated with the audit stream retention purge (also 730 d) so both happen in the same maintenance window.

entries.name: impersonation-scrub-token-hashes
entries.purpose: Weekly, Sunday 04:00 UTC. Dispatches PurgeImpersonationSessionsJob to NULL session_token_hash on ended sessions > 30 days old. Row is preserved (compliance evidence retained indefinitely per retention.json).

entries.name: delegations-remind-expiring
entries.purpose: Daily 09:00 UTC. Finds active delegations whose ends_at is within the next 24 hours, sends DelegationExpiringNotification to both delegator + delegate as a heads-up. Idempotent per delegation_id per day (guarded by observability lookback).
